title: Health Insights

chat.welcome: Ask me anything about your health data. I can help you understand trends, compare periods, and explain what your metrics mean.

examples.sleep: How was my sleep this week?
examples.labs: What do my latest lab results mean?
examples.trends: What are my heart rate trends?

privacy.standardDescription: Only aggregated summaries are sent. No raw data leaves your device.
privacy.enhancedToggle: Include detailed health data for a more specific response
privacy.enhancedWarning: You are about to send detailed health data to {{provider}}. This data will leave your device and be processed by a third-party AI service.
privacy.enhancedDetail: Only the data shown below will be sent.
privacy.consentConfirm: I understand and want to proceed
privacy.neverSent: Never sent: your name, date of birth, email, or device identifiers

disclaimer: This is not medical advice. Always consult a healthcare professional for medical concerns.
